description: Vietnamese wedding invitation web app — Next.js 14 + Supabase. Admin uploads details/photos/music; guests view animated invitation with countdown, album, QR payment, and live wishes wall.

userStories.title: Scaffold Next.js 14 project with dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the base project scaffolded with Next.js 14 App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, and all required dependencies so the team can build on a solid foundation.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --app --no-src-dir --import-alias '@/*' (in /Users/admin/Desktop/wedding-invite-app, accept all defaults)
Run: npm install @supabase/supabase-js @supabase/ssr
Run: npm install @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities
package.json contains all three dependency groups
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Working directory is /Users/admin/Desktop/wedding-invite-app which already has docs/ and scripts/ — create-next-app should scaffold INTO this directory, accepting overwrite prompts.

userStories.title: Configure Tailwind design tokens and global CSS
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the wedding design system (cream/burgundy/gold palette, Cormorant Garamond/Great Vibes/Montserrat fonts) wired into Tailwind and CSS variables so all components can use consistent styles.
acceptanceCriteria: tailwind.config.ts extends colors with: cream=#FAF8F3, cream-2=#F0E9DC, cream-3=#E4D8C6, burg=#7C1B2B, burg-2=#9B2F3F, burg-3=#5A1120, gold=#C9A96E, gold-2=#D8BC8A, dark=#231010, mid=#5C3535, soft=#7A5555
tailwind.config.ts extends fontFamily with: display=['Cormorant Garamond',serif], script=['Great Vibes',cursive], body=['Montserrat',sans-serif]
app/globals.css defines :root CSS variables for all colors and includes .phone class (max-width:430px, centered, border-radius:40px on desktop @media min-width:500px)
app/layout.tsx loads Google Fonts CDN link for Cormorant Garamond, Great Vibes, Montserrat and applies font-body to body
.env.local created with placeholder values for NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, ADMIN_PASSWORD, NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
.env.example created with same keys but empty values
.gitignore includes .env.local
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Supabase SQL migration files
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the SQL migrations for wedding_config and wishes tables (with RLS policies) saved in the repo so they can be run in the Supabase dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: supabase/migrations/001_init.sql creates wedding_config table with all columns from spec (id int4 PK default 1, bride_name, groom_name, wedding_date timestamptz, venue_name, venue_address, maps_url, dresscode, extra_notes, bank1_code, bank1_account, bank1_holder, bank2_code, bank2_account, bank2_holder, music_url, photos jsonb default '[]', updated_at) plus seed row and updated_at trigger
supabase/migrations/001_init.sql creates wishes table (id uuid PK gen_random_uuid(), guest_name, message, likes int4 default 0, approved boolean default false, created_at timestamptz default now())
supabase/migrations/002_rls.sql enables RLS on both tables and creates: public read policy on wedding_config, public read-approved-only on wishes, public insert on wishes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: These files are created for the user to run manually in Supabase dashboard. The storage buckets (wedding-photos, wedding-music) must also be created manually as public buckets.

userStories.title: Create shared types, Supabase clients, and VietQR helper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the shared TypeScript types, browser/server Supabase clients, and VietQR URL helper so all components have consistent types and data access patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/types.ts exports: PhotoEntry {url,sort_order}, WeddingConfig (all DB columns), Wish (all DB columns), PublicConfig = Omit<WeddingConfig,'updated_at'>, PublicWish = Pick<Wish,'id'|'guest_name'|'message'|'likes'|'created_at'>
lib/supabase/client.ts exports createClient() using createBrowserClient from @supabase/ssr
lib/supabase/server.ts exports createServerAnonClient() and createServiceClient() using createServerClient from @supabase/ssr with cookies() from next/headers

lib/vietqr.ts exports VN_BANKS record (at least: VCB, TCB, ACB, MB, VPB, TPB, STB, BIDV, CTG, VIB) and vietqrUrl(bankCode,accountNumber) returning https://img.vietqr.io/image/{bankCode}-{accountNumber}-qr_only.jpg
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add admin auth middleware and login/logout API routes
userStories.description: As an admin, I need password-gated access to /admin routes so only I can manage the wedding invitation.
acceptanceCriteria: middleware.ts guards all /admin/* routes (except /admin/login) by checking cookie 'admin_session' against ADMIN_PASSWORD env var; redirects to /admin/login if missing or wrong
app/api/admin/login/route.ts POST accepts {password}, validates against ADMIN_PASSWORD, sets httpOnly cookie 'admin_session' with 7-day maxAge, returns {ok:true} or 401
app/api/admin/logout/route.ts POST deletes 'admin_session' cookie and redirects to /admin/login
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build admin login page UI
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a clean login page where I enter my password to access the admin panel.
acceptanceCriteria: app/admin/login/page.tsx renders a centered card with title 'Quản lý thiệp cưới', password input, submit button, error display
On correct password: redirects to /admin
On wrong password: shows Vietnamese error message 'Sai mật khẩu'
Styled with bg-cream, burg button, font-display/font-body Tailwind classes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add config API routes (GET public, PATCH admin-only)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need GET /api/config to return public wedding config and PATCH /api/config (admin-only) to update it.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/config/route.ts GET fetches wedding_config row id=1 from Supabase and returns it as JSON; returns 404 if not found

app/api/config/route.ts PATCH validates admin_session cookie, whitelists allowed fields (bride_name, groom_name, wedding_date, venue_name, venue_address, maps_url, dresscode, extra_notes, bank1_code, bank1_account, bank1_holder, bank2_code, bank2_account, bank2_holder, music_url, photos), updates row, returns updated data
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add wishes API routes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need CRUD API routes for wishes: guests can submit, admins can moderate, anyone can like.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/wishes/route.ts GET returns approved wishes ordered by created_at desc (id, guest_name, message, likes, created_at only)
app/api/wishes/route.ts POST validates guest_name (required, max 100 chars) and message (required, max 500 chars), inserts with approved=false, returns 201
app/api/wishes/[id]/route.ts PATCH handles two cases: {like:true} increments likes column (no auth), or {approved:bool} toggles approval (admin cookie required)
app/api/wishes/[id]/route.ts DELETE requires admin cookie, deletes the wish
app/api/admin/wishes/route.ts GET requires admin cookie, returns ALL wishes (including unapproved) ordered by created_at desc
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add photo and music upload API routes
userStories.description: As an admin, I need API routes to upload photos to Supabase Storage (wedding-photos bucket) and MP3 to wedding-music bucket.
acceptanceCriteria: app/api/upload/photos/route.ts POST requires admin cookie, accepts multipart file (JPG/PNG/WEBP, max 10MB), uploads to wedding-photos bucket with timestamp filename, returns {url: publicUrl}
app/api/upload/music/route.ts POST requires admin cookie, accepts MP3 (max 20MB), uploads as bgm.mp3 (upsert:true) to wedding-music bucket, updates wedding_config music_url, returns {url: publicUrl}
Both routes return 401 if not admin, 400 if wrong file type or too large
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Build guest page shell and GuestInvitation wrapper
userStories.description: As a guest, I need the main invitation page to fetch config server-side and render all invitation sections after the envelope animation.
acceptanceCriteria: app/page.tsx is an async server component that fetches /api/config with 60s revalidation, passes config to child components
app/page.tsx renders <div className='phone'> containing <EnvelopeIntro> and <GuestInvitation config={config}>

components/guest/GuestInvitation.tsx is a 'use client' wrapper that renders HeroCard, MusicPlayer (if music_url), CountdownTimer, EventDetails, PhotoAlbum (if photos.length>0), LocationMap, BankQR (if bank1_account or bank2_account), WishesWall, and footer
GuestInvitation div has id='main-content' and starts with display:none (revealed by EnvelopeIntro)
Footer shows couple names in font-script, date, 'Made with ♥'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Stub out all imported components as empty functional components first if they don't exist yet, to avoid import errors.

userStories.title: Build EnvelopeIntro component
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to see an animated envelope with a 囍 wax seal that I tap to open the invitation.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/EnvelopeIntro.tsx renders a fixed full-screen overlay (#envelope) with cream background
Contains animated 囍 seal (gold circle, pulse animation), couple names in Great Vibes script font, 'Chạm để mở thiệp' tap instruction
6 floating petal elements with CSS keyframe animation (petalFall)
Clicking/tapping the envelope adds 'opening' class (envelopeExit CSS animation, 0.8s), then hides envelope, shows #main-content, dispatches 'envelope-opened' CustomEvent on window
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build HeroCard component
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to see an elegant hero section with the couple's names, wedding date, and a 囍 watermark in the cream/burgundy/gold color palette.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/HeroCard.tsx renders a full-viewport section (.hero) with cream background
Shows 囍 as large faint watermark (position:absolute, opacity:.05, font-size:18rem)
'Trân trọng kính mời' label in Montserrat uppercase tracking-wide
Groom name and bride name in Great Vibes 3.5rem gold/dark, separated by '&' in Cormorant Garamond italic
Wedding date formatted in Vietnamese (Thứ Bảy, 13.12.2025 style) in Cormorant Garamond
Diamond divider lines (gold horizontal rules with diamond accent) between sections
Formal Vietnamese invitation text in italic Cormorant Garamond
Falls back gracefully when config is null
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build CountdownTimer component
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to see a live countdown to the wedding date with days, hours, minutes, and seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/CountdownTimer.tsx renders a burgundy section with 4 time blocks (Ngày/Giờ/Phút/Giây)
Uses setInterval(tick, 1000) to update every second using useState/useEffect
Numbers in Cormorant Garamond 2.5rem cream color, labels in Montserrat uppercase
Countdown shows 00 for each unit when wedding date has passed (Math.max(0, diff))
weddingDate prop is ISO string, parsed with new Date()
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build MusicPlayer component
userStories.description: As a guest, I want background music to play automatically when I open the envelope, with a floating button to toggle it.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/MusicPlayer.tsx renders a fixed bottom-right floating button (48px circle, burgundy, high z-index)
Uses useRef for HTMLAudioElement with loop preload='none'
Listens for 'envelope-opened' window event to trigger audio.play()
Button shows ripple/pulse animation when playing
Shows 'Nhạc nền đám cưới' label for 3s after music starts, then hides
Toggle button: pause if playing, play if paused
musicUrl prop wires the audio src
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build EventDetails component
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to see the wedding date, time, venue, and dress code clearly displayed as detail cards.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/EventDetails.tsx renders a cream-2 section with cards for: Ngày cưới (formatted date), Thời gian (HH:MM SA), Địa điểm (venue name + address below), and Trang phục if config.dresscode is set
Each card has emoji icon, Montserrat uppercase label, Cormorant Garamond value
Falls back to hardcoded defaults when config is null
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build LocationMap component
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to see the venue on a map with a navigation button to get directions.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/LocationMap.tsx renders venue name, address, an embedded Google Maps iframe (200px tall, border-radius:12px), and a 'Chỉ đường' button
Maps iframe src uses config.maps_url if set, otherwise a default embed URL
'Chỉ đường' button links to maps.google.com with venue address query, opens in new tab
Styled with cream background, burgundy button
Falls back gracefully when config is null
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build BankQR component
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to see a QR code for bank transfer (mừng cưới) for each configured bank account.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/BankQR.tsx renders a 'Mừng cưới' section with a BankCard sub-component for each configured bank account
BankCard shows bank name (from VN_BANKS lookup), QR image (vietqrUrl() from lib/vietqr.ts), account number, account holder name
QR image uses next/image with onerror fallback hiding the image if VietQR URL fails
Shows bank2 card only if config.bank2_account is set
next.config.ts (or next.config.js) remotePatterns includes *.supabase.co storage paths AND img.vietqr.io
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build PhotoAlbum swipeable carousel
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to swipe through wedding photos in a smooth horizontal carousel that auto-advances.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/PhotoAlbum.tsx renders a dark-background section with a horizontal scroll container using CSS scroll-snap-type:x mandatory and -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch
Photos sorted by sort_order, rendered as Next.js Image (fill, objectFit:cover) in scroll-snap slides
Dot indicators update as user scrolls; counter shows 'N / Total'
Auto-advances every 4s using setInterval, pauses when user is touching (touchstart/touchend refs)
scrollbar-width:none hides the scrollbar
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build WishForm component
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to submit my name and a wish message to the couple.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/WishForm.tsx renders a form with guest_name input (required, max 100) and message textarea (required, max 500)
POST to /api/wishes on submit; shows loading state during request
On success: shows '♥ Cảm ơn lời chúc của bạn!' confirmation with note about moderation and 'Gửi lời chúc khác' reset button
On error: shows Vietnamese error message inline
Styled with cream background inputs, cream-3 border, burg focus ring, burg submit button
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build WishesWall with Supabase Realtime
userStories.description: As a guest, I want to see all approved wishes update in real-time, and like my favorite ones.
acceptanceCriteria: components/guest/WishesWall.tsx fetches approved wishes from GET /api/wishes on mount
Subscribes to Supabase Realtime postgres_changes on 'wishes' table (approved=eq.true filter) for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE events
Falls back to polling every 30s if Realtime fails
Each wish card shows: guest_name, message, formatted Vietnamese date, like button (🤍/❤️) with count
Like action: PATCH /api/wishes/{id} with {like:true}, optimistic UI update, deduplicates via localStorage 'liked_wishes' key
Renders WishForm above the wish cards
Shows empty state: 'Chưa có lời chúc nào. Hãy là người đầu tiên!'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin dashboard shell with tab navigation
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a tabbed dashboard with a sticky header showing 'Thông tin / Ảnh / Lời chúc' tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: components/admin/AdminShell.tsx is a 'use client' component with useState for active tab (config/photos/wishes)
Sticky burgundy header shows 'Quản lý thiệp cưới' title, couple names subtitle, and 'Đăng xuất' button
Logout calls POST /api/admin/logout then redirects to /admin/login
Tab bar below header with 3 tabs; active tab has burg border-bottom and burg text color
Renders ConfigForm, PhotoManager, or WishesManager based on active tab
app/admin/page.tsx renders <AdminShell />
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin ConfigForm
userStories.description: As an admin, I need a form to edit all wedding details, bank accounts, and upload music.
acceptanceCriteria: components/admin/ConfigForm.tsx fetches config on mount from GET /api/config
Form sections: bride/groom names + wedding datetime-local, venue name/address/maps URL, dresscode/notes, bank1 (dropdown + account + holder), bank2 (same, optional), music upload
Bank dropdown uses VN_BANKS from lib/vietqr.ts
If music file selected: POST to /api/upload/music first, then include returned URL in PATCH
PATCH /api/config on save; shows '✓ Đã lưu!' on success
Styled with white rounded-xl cards per section, bg-cream page, burg save button
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin PhotoManager with drag-and-drop reorder
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to upload photos, see thumbnails, drag to reorder them, and delete individual photos.
acceptanceCriteria: components/admin/PhotoManager.tsx fetches config.photos on mount
File input (accept image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp, multiple) uploads each file to POST /api/upload/photos and appends returned URLs to photos state
Thumbnail grid uses @dnd-kit/core DndContext + @dnd-kit/sortable SortableContext with rectSortingStrategy
Each photo uses useSortable hook; drag updates array order via arrayMove from @dnd-kit/sortable
Delete button (✕) per photo removes it from state
When photos are changed (reordered/deleted/added), show 'Lưu thứ tự ảnh' button that PATCHes /api/config with updated photos array
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build admin WishesManager with moderation
userStories.description: As an admin, I need to see all wishes (including unapproved), approve/reject them, and delete them.
acceptanceCriteria: components/admin/WishesManager.tsx fetches ALL wishes from GET /api/admin/wishes on mount
Filter buttons: 'Chờ duyệt (N)' / 'Đã duyệt' / 'Tất cả' where N is count of unapproved
Each wish card shows: guest_name, formatted Vietnamese datetime, message, like count, '✓ Duyệt'/'✓ Đã duyệt' toggle button, '🗑 Xoá' delete button
Approve toggle: PATCH /api/wishes/{id} with {approved:!current}, updates local state
Delete: confirm() dialog, then DELETE /api/wishes/{id}, removes from local state
Subscribes to Supabase Realtime on 'wishes' table; reloads on any change
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Final build verification and git init
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the project to compile cleanly with no TypeScript errors and all files committed.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build completes with 0 errors
No TypeScript errors from npx tsc --noEmit
All source files committed (git add -A && git commit)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: If Supabase env vars are not set, the build may fail on API routes that import from lib/supabase/server.ts. In that case, ensure .env.local has placeholder values so the module resolves. The app will error at runtime but should build.
